title: Advanced usages of the contrary 'dao'
structure: Subj. + Verb + 得 + 倒 + Adj.
explanation: Advanced usages of the contrary 'dao'. Used for contrasting, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 你想得倒美！不工作还想拿工资？
examples.pinyin: nǐ xiǎng dé dǎo měi ！bù gōngzuò huán xiǎng ná gōngzī ？
examples.english: You want to be beautiful! Want to get paid if you don't work?

examples.chinese: 你想得倒简单！怎么可能？
examples.pinyin: nǐ xiǎng dé dǎo jiǎndān ！zěnyāo kěnéng ？
examples.english: What you think is simple! How can it be?

examples.chinese: 这个小女孩倒挺勇敢的。
examples.pinyin: zhè gè xiǎo nv̌hái dǎo tǐng yǒnggǎn de 。
examples.english: This little girl is quite brave.

examples.chinese: 你倒蛮会说话的。
examples.pinyin: nǐ dǎo mán hùi shuōhuà de 。
examples.english: You can talk.

examples.chinese: 你们都说这个菜太辣了，我倒不觉得。
examples.pinyin: nǐmen dū shuō zhègè cài tàilàle ，wǒ dǎo bù juédé 。
examples.english: You all say that this dish is too spicy, I don't think so.

title: Emphasizing with 'henshi'
explanation: Emphasizing with 'henshi'. Used for expressing degree, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 这样做很是必要。
examples.pinyin: zhèyángzuò hěnshì bìyào 。
examples.english: This is necessary.

examples.chinese: 你的工作表现让领导很是满意。
examples.pinyin: nǐ de gōngzuò biǎoxiàn ràng lǐngdǎo hěnshì mǎnyì 。
examples.english: Your performance is very satisfying to the leader.

examples.chinese: 你穿西装看起来很是精神。
examples.pinyin: nǐ chuān xīzhuāng kànqǐlái hěnshì jīngshén 。
examples.english: You look very spirited in a suit.

examples.chinese: 这件事让我很是不舒服。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì ràng wǒ hěnshì bù shūfú 。
examples.english: This thing makes me very uncomfortable.

examples.chinese: 我老板很是喜欢你的设计风格。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎobǎn hěnshì xǐhuān nǐ de shèjì fēnggé 。
examples.english: My boss likes your design style very much.

title: Expressing 'a full' with 'zuzu'
structure: 足足 + Verb  /  Verb + 足足
explanation: Expressing 'a full' with 'zuzu'. Used for emphasizing a number.

examples.chinese: 姚明身高足足有2.26米。
examples.pinyin: yáomíng shēngāo zúzú yǒu 2.26mǐ 。
examples.english: Yao Ming is 2.26 meters tall.

examples.chinese: 昨天我的约会不太顺利，她让我等了足足两个小时。
examples.pinyin: zuótiān wǒde yuēhùi bù tài shùnlì，tā ràng wǒ děng le zúzú liǎng gè xiǎoshí 。
examples.english: Yesterday my appointment was not going well. She made me wait two full hours.

examples.chinese: 怪不得他汉语说得那么好，他在中国住了足足十年的时间！
examples.pinyin: guàibùdé tā hànyǔ shuō dé nàyāo hǎo，tā zài zhōngguó zhù le zúzú shí nián de shíjiān！
examples.english: No wonder he speaks Chinese so well, he lived in China for a full ten years!

title: Expressing 'again and again' with 'yizai'
explanation: Expressing 'again and again' with 'yizai'. Used for emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 我一再跟你说，出门在外要小心。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yīzài gēn nǐ shuō ，chūménzàiwài yào xiǎoxīn 。
examples.english: I have repeatedly told you to be careful when going out.

examples.chinese: 他总是犹犹豫豫，一再错失良机。
examples.pinyin: tā zǒngshì yóuyóuyùyù ，yīzài cuòshīliángjī 。
examples.english: He always hesitated and missed opportunities again and again.

examples.chinese: 一再强调。
examples.pinyin: yīzài qiángdiào 。
examples.english: Repeatedly emphasized.

examples.chinese: 一再请求。
examples.pinyin: yīzài qǐngqíu 。
examples.english: Repeated requests.

examples.chinese: 一再狡辩。
examples.pinyin: yīzài jiǎobiàn 。
examples.english: Repeated sophistry.

title: Expressing 'always previously' with 'xianglai'
explanation: Expressing 'always previously' with 'xianglai'. Used for referring to the past, expressing frequency.

examples.chinese: 我父母向来不喜欢我跟你们一起出去玩儿。
examples.pinyin: wǒ fùmǔ xiànglái bù xǐhuān wǒ gēn nǐmen yīqǐ chūqù wánér 。
examples.english: My parents have never liked me hanging out with you.

examples.chinese: 我向来努力，所以我每一次考试都得满分。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiànglái nǔlì，suǒyǐ wǒ měi yī cì kǎoshì dū dé mǎnfēn 。
examples.english: I always work hard, so I get full marks for every exam.

examples.chinese: 那个足球队员一向被称为“金脚”，因为他踢足球踢得非常好。
examples.pinyin: nàgè zúqíu dùiyuán yīxiàng bèi chēngwèi “jīnjiǎo”，yīnwèi tā tī zúqíu tī dé fēicháng hǎo 。
examples.english: The football player has always been called the "golden foot" because he played football very well.

title: Expressing 'as expected' with 'guoran'
explanation: Expressing 'as expected' with 'guoran'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 第一名果然是她！我就知道。
examples.pinyin: dìyīmíng guǒrán shì tā ！wǒ jìu zhīdào 。
examples.english: The first place is indeed her! I knew it.

examples.chinese: 大厨做的菜果然不一样！好吃！
examples.pinyin: dàchú zuò de cài guǒrán bùyīyáng ！hǎochī ！
examples.english: The chef's dishes are different! good to eat!

examples.chinese: 你说得没错！他果然是个骗子！
examples.pinyin: nǐ shuō dé méicuò ！tā guǒrán shì gè piànzǐ ！
examples.english: You are right! He really is a liar!

examples.chinese: 这个止疼药果然有效，我的头疼好多了。
examples.pinyin: zhègè zhǐténgyào guǒrán yǒuxiào ，wǒde tóuténg hǎoduōle 。
examples.english: This painkiller really works, and my headache is much better.

examples.chinese: 司机师傅说马上到，果然，两分钟以后车就来了。
examples.pinyin: sījī shīfù shuō mǎshàng dào ，guǒrán ，liǎngfēnzhōng yǐhòu chē jìu lái le 。
examples.english: The driver master said to be here soon, and sure enough, the car would come in two minutes.

title: Expressing 'as if' with 'sihu'
explanation: Expressing 'as if' with 'sihu'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 老板今天似乎不太高兴。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn jīntiān sìhū bùtài gāoxīng 。
examples.english: The boss seems not too happy today.

examples.chinese: 你说得似乎很有道理。
examples.pinyin: nǐ shuō dé sìhū hěn yǒudàolǐ 。
examples.english: What you said makes sense.

examples.chinese: 他似乎明白这句话的意思，却又说不清楚。
examples.pinyin: tā sìhū míngbái zhèjùhuà de yìsī ，què yòu shuōbùqīngchǔ 。
examples.english: He seemed to understand the meaning of this sentence, but he couldn't say it clearly.

examples.chinese: 她似乎隐瞒了什么。
examples.pinyin: tā sìhū yǐnmán le shíyāo 。
examples.english: She seems to be hiding something.

examples.chinese: 似乎没有人关心那个小男孩。
examples.pinyin: sìhū méiyǒurén guānxīn nàgè xiǎonánhái 。
examples.english: No one seemed to care about the little boy.

title: Expressing 'as long as' with 'fanshi'
structure: 凡是 + Noun + 都 / 就 / 一律 + Predicate
explanation: Expressing 'as long as' with 'fanshi'

examples.chinese: 凡是用鸡蛋做的菜，他都不喜欢。
examples.pinyin: fánshì yòng jīdàn zuò de cài ，tā dū bù xǐhuān 。
examples.english: He doesn't like dishes made with eggs.

examples.chinese: 凡是不听话的孩子都没有糖吃。
examples.pinyin: fánshì bù tīnghuà de háizǐ dū méiyǒu táng chī 。
examples.english: No disobedient child eats sugar.

examples.chinese: 凡是会员都有折扣。
examples.pinyin: fánshì hùiyuán dū yǒu zhékòu 。
examples.english: All members have discounts.

examples.chinese: 凡是美国公民就可以投票，这是真的吗？
examples.pinyin: fánshì měiguó gōngmín jìu kěyǐ tóupiào ，zhè shì zhēnde ma ？
examples.english: Is it true that any American citizen can vote?

examples.chinese: 凡是提前三天报名的人就可以免费入场。
examples.pinyin: fánshì tíqián sāntiān bàomíng de rén jìu kěyǐ miǎnfèi rùcháng 。
examples.english: Those who sign up three days in advance can enter for free.

title: Expressing 'contrary to expectations' with 'pianpian'
explanation: Expressing 'contrary to expectations' with 'pianpian'. Used for contrasting.

examples.chinese: 经过大家的讨论，问题都解决了，偏偏他还要钻牛角尖。
examples.pinyin: jīngguò dàjiā de tǎolùn，wèntí dū jiějué le，piānpiān tā huán yào zuàn níujiǎojiān 。
examples.english: After everyone's discussion, the problem has been solved, but he still has to be horny.

examples.chinese: 不叫他去，他偏偏要去。
examples.pinyin: bù jiào tā qù，tā piānpiān yào qù 。
examples.english: Don't ask him to go, he just wants to go.

examples.chinese: 大家都叫他离开了，偏偏他还赖着不走。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā dū jiào tā líkāi le，piānpiān tā huán làizháo bù zǒu 。
examples.english: Everyone told him to leave, but he still refused to leave.

examples.chinese: 星期天他来找我，偏偏我不在家。
examples.pinyin: xīngqītiān tā lái zhǎo wǒ，piānpiān wǒ bù zài jiā 。
examples.english: He came to me on Sunday, but I was not at home.

examples.chinese: 好不容易找到了他，偏偏又碰上小李拉他去办事。
examples.pinyin: hǎobù róngyì zhǎodào le tā，piānpiān yòu pèngshàng xiǎolǐ lā tā qù bànshì 。
examples.english: Finally, he was found, but Xiaoli pulled him to work again.

title: Expressing 'no exception' with 'yilu'
explanation: Expressing 'no exception' with 'yilu'. Used for expressing attitude, emphasizing, expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 明天的部门会议一律都要参加。
examples.pinyin: míngtiān de bùmén hùiyì yīlv̀ dū yào cānjiā 。
examples.english: Tomorrow ’s department meetings will all be attended.

examples.chinese: 70岁以上的老人坐公交一律都免费。
examples.pinyin: 70sùi yǐshàng de lǎorén zuògōngjiāo yīlv̀ dū miǎnfèi 。
examples.english: Old people over 70 years old are free of charge.

examples.chinese: 不管是谁，一律都要通过六个月试用期。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn shì shúi ，yīlv̀ dū yào tōngguò lìugèyuè shìyòngqī 。
examples.english: No matter who it is, all have to pass the six-month trial period.

examples.chinese: 不需要的东西一律捐掉。
examples.pinyin: bùxūyào de dōngxī yīlv̀ juāndiào 。
examples.english: Do n’t give away anything you do n’t need.

examples.chinese: 政府命令重污染企业一律停业。
examples.pinyin: zhèngfǔ mìnglìng zhòngwūrǎn qǐyè yīlv̀ tíngyè 。
examples.english: The government ordered all heavily polluting enterprises to shut down.

title: Expressing 'nothing but' with 'wufei'
structure: 无非 + 是 + Noun / Verb Phrase
explanation: Expressing 'nothing but' with 'wufei'

examples.chinese: 我空闲时间无非是游泳、看书而已。
examples.pinyin: wǒ kōngxián shíjiān wúfēi shì yóuyǒng、kàn shū éryǐ 。
examples.english: My free time is nothing more than swimming and reading.

examples.chinese: 我空闲时间无非游泳、看书而已。
examples.pinyin: wǒ kōngxián shíjiān wúfēi yóuyǒng、kàn shū éryǐ 。
examples.english: My free time is nothing more than swimming and reading.

examples.chinese: 我无非是批评了他几句，他怎么哭了？
examples.pinyin: wǒ wúfēi shì pīpíng le tā jī jù，tā zěnyāo kū le ？
examples.english: I just criticized him a few words, why did he cry?

examples.chinese: 我无非批评了他几句，他怎么哭了？
examples.pinyin: wǒ wúfēi pīpíng le tā jī jù，tā zěnyāo kū le ？
examples.english: I just criticized him a few words, why did he cry?

examples.chinese: 我们无非是谈了一下孩子的教育问题罢了，没谈什么特别的事情。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen wúfēi shì tán le yīxià háizǐ de jiàoyù wèntí bàle，méi tán shíyāo tèbié de shìqíng 。
examples.english: We just talked about the children's education, nothing special.

title: Expressing 'when the time comes' with 'dao shihou'
explanation: Expressing 'when the time comes' with 'dao shihou'. Used for expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 现在不好好准备考试，到时候肯定考不好。
examples.pinyin: xiànzài bù hǎohǎo zhǔnbèi kǎoshì，dàoshíhòu kěndìng kǎo bùhǎo 。
examples.english: It is not good to prepare for the exam now, and it will definitely be bad by the time.

examples.chinese: 我要学唱中文的生日快乐歌，到时候唱给你们听。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yào xué chàng zhōngwén de shēngrìkuàilè gē，dàoshíhòu chàng gěi nǐmen tīng 。
examples.english: I ’m going to learn to sing Happy Birthday in Chinese and I ’ll sing it to you.

examples.chinese: 你先自己试一试，到时候我再教你。
examples.pinyin: nǐ xiān zìjǐ shì yī shì，dàoshíhòu wǒ zài jiào nǐ 。
examples.english: You try it yourself, and I will teach you later.

examples.chinese: 到时候见。
examples.pinyin: dàoshíhòu jiàn 。
examples.english: see you then.

examples.chinese: 到时候看吧。
examples.pinyin: dàoshíhòu kàn ba 。
examples.english: Let's watch it.

title: Expressing 'why' with 'hebi'
explanation: Expressing 'why' with 'hebi'. Used for expressing attitude, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 他已经道歉了，你何必还生气？
examples.pinyin: tā yǐjīng dàoqiàn le ，nǐ hébì huán shēngqì ？
examples.english: He has apologized, why are you still angry?

examples.chinese: 都是一家人，你们何必这么客气？
examples.pinyin: dūshì yījiārén ，nǐmen hébì zhèyāo kèqì ？
examples.english: They are all a family, why are you so polite?

examples.chinese: 上海的房子那么贵，你儿子何必要在那儿买房子？
examples.pinyin: shànghǎi de fángzǐ nàyāo gùi ，nǐérzǐ hébì yào zài nàér mǎi fángzǐ ？
examples.english: The house in Shanghai is so expensive, why should your son buy a house there?

examples.chinese: 我只是不小心踩了你一下，你何必骂人？
examples.pinyin: wǒ zhǐshì bùxiǎoxīn cǎi le nǐ yīxià ，nǐ hébì màrén ？
examples.english: I just stepped on you accidentally, why do you curse?

examples.chinese: 何必下周？
examples.pinyin: hébì xiàzhōu ？
examples.english: Why next week?

title: Expressing that something has already happened with 'laizhe'
explanation: Expressing that something has already happened with 'laizhe'. Used for sequencing events in time.

examples.chinese: 昨天有人来找你来着。
examples.pinyin: zuótiān yǒu rén lái zhǎo nǐ láizháo 。
examples.english: Someone came to see you yesterday.

examples.chinese: 那本书昨天还在这儿来着，今天怎么找不到了？
examples.pinyin: nà běn shū zuótiān huán zài zhèér láizháo，jīntiān zěnyāo zhǎo bùdào le ？
examples.english: That book was here yesterday, why can't I find it today?

examples.chinese: 他叫什么来着？
examples.pinyin: tā jiào shíyāo láizháo ？
examples.english: What's his name?

examples.chinese: 那首歌是谁唱的来着？
examples.pinyin: nà shǒu gē shì shúi chàng de láizháo ？
examples.english: Who sang that song?

examples.chinese: 我们上次说周末去哪儿玩来着？
examples.pinyin: wǒmen shàng cì shuō zhōumò qù nǎér wán láizháo ？
examples.english: We said last time where to play on the weekend?

title: Expressing 'as well as' with 'yiji'
explanation: Expressing 'as well as' with 'yiji'. Used for listing.

examples.chinese: 听觉、视觉、嗅觉、味觉以及触觉都属于感官。
examples.pinyin: tīngjué 、shìjué 、xìujué 、wèijué yǐjí hóngjué dū shǔyú gǎnguān 。
examples.english: Hearing, sight, smell, taste and touch all belong to the senses.

examples.chinese: 艺术有很多种类，绘画、舞蹈、电影以及文学等都是艺术。
examples.pinyin: yìzhú yǒu hěnduō zhǒnglèi ，hùihuà 、wǔdǎo 、diànyǐng yǐjí wénxué děng dū shì yìzhú 。
examples.english: There are many types of art, and painting, dance, film, and literature are all art.

examples.chinese: 院子里种着玫瑰花、茉莉花、牡丹花以及其他一些花草。
examples.pinyin: yuànzǐ lǐ zhǒngzháo méigūihuā 、mòlìhuā 、mǔdānhuā yǐjí qítā yīxiē huācǎo 。
examples.english: The yard is planted with roses, jasmine, peony and other flowers.

examples.chinese: 我们的价值就是采访、分析以及组合投资管理人。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen de jiàzhí jìushì cǎifǎng、fēnxī yǐjí zǔhé tóuzī guǎnlǐ rén 。
examples.english: Our value is interviews, analysis and portfolio investment managers.

examples.chinese: 习主席祝全国人民以及全体海外华人新年快乐。
examples.pinyin: xí zhǔxí zhù quánguó rénmín yǐjí quántǐ hǎiwài huárén xīnniánkuàilè 。
examples.english: President Xi wished the people throughout the country and all overseas Chinese a happy new year.

title: Indicating contrast with 'ze'
explanation: Indicating contrast with 'ze'. Used for contrasting.

examples.chinese: 南方人喜欢吃甜的东西，北方人则喜欢吃咸的东西。
examples.pinyin: nánfāng rén xǐhuān chī tián de dōngxī，běifāng rén zé xǐhuān chī xián de dōngxī 。
examples.english: Southerners like to eat sweet things, while northerners like to eat salty things.

examples.chinese: 美国人比较开放，他们喜欢认识新的朋友，中国人则比较害羞，他们更喜欢与亲密的朋友交往。
examples.pinyin: měiguó rén bǐjiào kāifàng，tāmen xǐhuān rènshì xīn de péngyǒu，zhōngguó rén zé bǐjiào hàixīu，tāmen gèng xǐhuān yǔ qīnmì de péngyǒu jiāowǎng 。
examples.english: Americans are more open-minded. They like to meet new friends, while Chinese people are more shy.

examples.chinese: 我老婆习惯安静、自然的乡村生活，我则习惯喧闹繁忙的大城市生活。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎopó xíguàn ānjìng、zìrán de xiāngcūn shēnghuó，wǒ zé xíguàn xuānnào fánmáng de dà chéngshì shēnghuó 。
examples.english: My wife is used to quiet, natural country life, and I am used to the noisy and busy city life.

examples.chinese: 南方人喜欢吃甜的东西，而北方人则喜欢吃咸的东西。
examples.pinyin: nánfāng rén xǐhuān chī tián de dōngxī，ér běifāng rén zé xǐhuān chī xián de dōngxī 。
examples.english: Southerners like to eat sweet things, while northerners like to eat salty things.

examples.chinese: 美国人比较开放，他们喜欢认识新的朋友，而中国人则比较害羞，他们更喜欢与内圈的朋友交往。
examples.pinyin: měiguó rén bǐjiào kāifàng，tāmen xǐhuān rènshì xīn de péngyǒu，ér zhōngguó rén zé bǐjiào hàixīu，tāmen gèng xǐhuān yǔ nèiquān de péngyǒu jiāowǎng 。
examples.english: Americans are more open, they like to meet new friends, while Chinese people are more shy, they prefer to socialize with friends in the inner circle.

title: In order to avoid with 'yimian'
explanation: In order to avoid with 'yimian'. Used for expressing a central concept.

examples.chinese: 这儿有高压电线，请不要靠近，以免发生危险。
examples.pinyin: zhèér yǒu gāoyādiànxiàn，qǐng bùyào kàojìn，yǐmiǎn fāshēng wēixiǎn 。
examples.english: There are high-voltage wires here, please do not come close to avoid danger.

examples.chinese: 加强安全措施，以免发生工伤事故。
examples.pinyin: jiāqiáng ānquán cuòshī，yǐmiǎn fāshēng gōngshāngshìgù 。
examples.english: Strengthen safety measures to avoid accidents at work.

examples.chinese: 行人和车辆必须严格遵守交通法规，以免发生交通事故。
examples.pinyin: xíngrén hé chēliàng bìxū yángé zūnshǒu jiāotōngfǎgūi，yǐmiǎn fāshēngjiāotōngshìgù 。
examples.english: Pedestrians and vehicles must strictly abide by traffic regulations to avoid traffic accidents.

examples.chinese: 你赶紧走，以免晚了。
examples.pinyin: nǐ gǎnjǐn zǒu，yǐmiǎn wǎn le 。
examples.english: You hurried away so as not to be late.

examples.chinese: 快抓住那个坏人，以免跑了。
examples.pinyin: kuài zhuāzhù nàgè huàirén，yǐmiǎn pǎo le 。
examples.english: Grab the bad guy quickly so as not to run away.

title: Expressing 'your side' with 'ben'
explanation: Expressing 'your side' with 'ben'

examples.chinese: 本人。
examples.pinyin: běn rén 。
examples.english: Me.

examples.chinese: 顾客至上是本公司的经营理念。
examples.pinyin: gùkèzhìshàng shì běn gōngsī de jīngyíng lǐniàn 。
examples.english: Customer first is our business philosophy.

examples.chinese: 本校不允许外校学生随便进出。
examples.pinyin: běn xiào bù yǔnxǔ wàixiào xuéshēng súibiàn jìnchū 。
examples.english: The school does not allow foreign students to enter and leave at will.

examples.chinese: 本组织。
examples.pinyin: běn zǔzhī 。
examples.english: The organization.

title: Indicating a characteristic with 'xing'
explanation: Indicating a characteristic with 'xing'

examples.chinese: 你知道管理的科学性和艺术性是指什么吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhīdào guǎnlǐ de kēxué xìng hé yìzhú xìng shì zhǐ shíyāo ma ？
examples.english: Do you know what scientific and artistic management means?

examples.chinese: 你交的这个产品宣传方案没有可行性。
examples.pinyin: nǐ jiāo de zhè gè chǎnpǐn xuānchuán fāngàn méiyǒu kěxíngxìng 。
examples.english: The product promotion plan you submitted is not feasible.

examples.chinese: 中国四川省的山区，发生地震的可能性较大。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguó sìchuān shěng de shānqū，fāshēng dìzhèn de kěnéngxìng jiào dà 。
examples.english: Mountainous areas in Sichuan Province, China, are more likely to have earthquakes.

examples.chinese: 本公司对员工上班时间没有硬性规定。
examples.pinyin: běn gōngsī dùi yuángōng shàngbān shíjiān méiyǒu yìngxìng gūidìng 。
examples.english: The company has no hard-and-fast rules about employee working hours.

examples.chinese: 你的作品越来越有创造性。
examples.pinyin: nǐ de zuòpǐn yuè lái yuè yǒu chuàngzào xìng 。
examples.english: Your work is becoming more and more creative.

title: Expressing 'is or is not' with 'shifou'
explanation: Expressing 'is or is not' with 'shifou'

examples.chinese: 他们是否考虑过在上海买房？
examples.pinyin: tāmen shìfǒu kǎolv̀ guò zài shànghǎi mǎi fáng ？
examples.english: Have they considered buying a house in Shanghai?

examples.chinese: 你父母是否同意你们住在一起？
examples.pinyin: nǐ fùmǔ shìfǒu tóngyì nǐmen zhù zài yīqǐ ？
examples.english: Do your parents agree that you live together?

examples.chinese: 你是否清楚这样做的后果？
examples.pinyin: nǐ shìfǒu qīngchǔ zhèyáng zuò de hòuguǒ ？
examples.english: Are you aware of the consequences of this?

title: Expressing possession with 'zhi'
explanation: Expressing possession with 'zhi'. Used for expressing possession.

examples.chinese: 害人之心不可有，防人之心不可无。
examples.pinyin: hài rén zhī xīn bù kě yǒu，fáng rén zhī xīn bù kě wú 。
examples.english: There must be no hurting heart, and no guarding heart.

examples.chinese: 这些解决问题的方式仍然有不足之处。
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē jiějué wèntí de fāngshì réngrán yǒu bùzú zhī chù 。
examples.english: These solutions to problems still have deficiencies.

examples.chinese: 粗心之害大于无知。
examples.pinyin: cūxīn zhī hài dàyú wúzhī 。
examples.english: Carelessness is greater than ignorance.

title: Expressing the self-evident with 'ma'
explanation: Expressing the self-evident with 'ma'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 你妹妹很漂亮嘛。
examples.pinyin: nǐ mèimèi hěn piāoliàng ma 。
examples.english: Your sister is beautiful.

examples.chinese: 他挺有钱的嘛。
examples.pinyin: tā tǐng yǒuqián de ma 。
examples.english: He is quite rich.

examples.chinese: 不想去就不要去嘛。
examples.pinyin: bù xiǎng qù jìu bùyào qù ma 。
examples.english: Do n’t go if you do n’t want to.

examples.chinese: 你别太谦虚嘛。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bié tài qiānxū ma 。
examples.english: Don't be too humble.

examples.chinese: 大家有话就说嘛。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā yǒu huà jìu shuō ma 。
examples.english: Everyone has something to say.

title: Expressing 'whether or not' with 'yufou'
explanation: Expressing 'whether or not' with 'yufou'

examples.chinese: 成功与否，要靠自己。
examples.pinyin: chénggōng yǔfǒu，yào kào zìjǐ 。
examples.english: Success depends on yourself.

examples.chinese: 国家发达与否，取决于它的人均国内生产总值有多高。
examples.pinyin: guójiā fādá yǔfǒu，qǔjuéyú tā de rénjūn guónèi shēngchǎn zǒngzhí yǒu duō gāo 。
examples.english: Whether a country is developed depends on how high its GDP per capita is.

examples.chinese: 头发、皮肤、眼睛等可以显示身体健康与否。
examples.pinyin: tóufā、 pífū、 yǎnjīng děng kěyǐ xiǎnshì shēntǐ jiànkāng yǔfǒu 。
examples.english: Hair, skin, eyes, etc. can show whether you are healthy or not.

title: Using the particle 'bei'
explanation: Using the particle 'bei'. Used for expressing the obvious.

examples.chinese: 别问我们为什么去KTV唱歌，热闹好玩儿呗！
examples.pinyin: biéwèn wǒmen wèishíyāo qù KTV chànggē，rènào hǎo wánér bài！
examples.english: Do n’t ask why we go to KTV to sing, it ’s hilarious and fun!

examples.chinese: 如果你不知道怎么说，就查词典呗！
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ nǐ bù zhīdào zěnyāo shuō，jìu chá cídiǎn bài！
examples.english: If you do n’t know what to say, just check the dictionary!

examples.chinese: 要是不懂，就好好学呗。
examples.pinyin: yàoshì bùdǒng，jìu hǎohǎo xué bài 。
examples.english: If you do n’t understand, learn it.

examples.chinese: 如果你不想去就不去呗。
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ nǐ bù xiǎng qù jìu bù qù bài 。
examples.english: If you do n’t want to go, do n’t go.

title: Expressing 'in light of' with 'jianyu'
explanation: Expressing 'in light of' with 'jianyu'. Used for indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 鉴于是紧急情况，我们应该尽快做出决定。
examples.pinyin: jiànyú shì jǐnjí qíngkuàng，wǒmen yìnggāi jǐnkuài zuòchū juédìng 。
examples.english: In view of the emergency, we should make a decision as soon as possible.

examples.chinese: 鉴于我儿子的成绩不太好，所以我让他去补习班。
examples.pinyin: jiànyú wǒ érzǐ de chéngjī bù tài hǎo，suǒyǐ wǒ ràng tā qù bǔxíbān 。
examples.english: In view of my son's poor grades, I asked him to go to cram school.

examples.chinese: 鉴于上周的恐怖袭击事件，当地政府采取了特殊的安保措施。
examples.pinyin: jiànyú shàngzhōu de kǒngbù xíjí shìjiàn，dāngdì zhèngfǔ cǎiqǔ le tèshū de ānbǎo cuòshī 。
examples.english: In view of the terrorist attacks last week, the local government took special security measures.

title: Adding emphasis with 'fei....buke'
structure: Subj. + 非(要) + [Verb Phrase] + 不可
explanation: Adding emphasis with 'fei....buke'. Used for giving commands, expressing obligations, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 气死我了，我非要打死你不可。
examples.pinyin: qì sǐ wǒ le ，wǒ fēiyào dǎ sǐ nǐ bùkě 。
examples.english: I'm so mad, I must kill you.

examples.chinese: 我们非问清楚不可。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen fēi wèn qīngchǔ bùkě 。
examples.english: We must ask clearly.

examples.chinese: 我非抓到他不可。
examples.pinyin: wǒ fēi zhuādào tā bùkě 。
examples.english: I must catch him.

examples.chinese: 今天那么冷，可是我女儿非要穿裙子。
examples.pinyin: jīntiān nàyāo lěng，kěshì wǒ nv̌ér fēiyào chuān qúnzǐ 。
examples.english: Today is so cold, but my daughter must wear a skirt.

examples.chinese: 我不让他喝那么多，可是他非要喝。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bù ràng tā hē nàyāo duō ，kěshì tā fēiyào hē 。
examples.english: I don't let him drink so much, but he has to drink.

title: Could it be that with 'qibushi'
explanation: Could it be that with 'qibushi'. Used for expressing a rhetorical question.

examples.chinese: 他们不来岂不是更好？
examples.pinyin: tāmen bù lái qǐbùshì gèng hǎo ？
examples.english: Would n’t it be better if they did n’t come?

examples.chinese: 你这样做岂不是给自己找麻烦？
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhèyáng zuò qǐbùshì gěi zìjǐ zhǎo máfán ？
examples.english: Would n’t you trouble yourself?

examples.chinese: 如果连你都不帮他，他岂不是死定了？
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ lián nǐ dū bù bāng tā，tā qǐbùshì sǐ dìng le ？
examples.english: If you do n’t even help him, is n’t he dead?

examples.chinese: 你是警察，这样做岂不是知法犯法？
examples.pinyin: nǐ shì jǐngchá，zhèyáng zuò qǐbùshì zhī fǎ fànfǎ ？
examples.english: You are a policeman. Is n’t it a crime to know the law?

examples.chinese: 他不在的时候你去找他，岂不是浪费时间？
examples.pinyin: tā bù zài deshíhòu nǐ qù zhǎo tā， qǐbùshì làngfèi shíjiān ？
examples.english: Would n’t it be a waste of time to go to him when he was away?

title: Expressing 'at the same time' with 'jian'
structure: (Subj. + 兼 + Verb + Noun 1 + 和 + Noun 2 ) / ( Subj. + 是 + Noun 1 + 兼 + Noun 2 )
explanation: Expressing 'at the same time' with 'jian'

examples.chinese: 这首歌的主唱兼词作者就是他。
examples.pinyin: zhè shǒu gē de zhǔchàng jiān cí zuòzhě jìu shì tā 。
examples.english: He is the lead singer and author of this song.

examples.chinese: 在那部电影里，他兼做导演和男主角。
examples.pinyin: zài nà bù diànyǐng lǐ，tā jiān zuò dǎoyǎn hé nánzhǔjiǎo 。
examples.english: In that movie, he doubled as a director and actor.

examples.chinese: 你的职责是日常行政工作兼人事招聘。
examples.pinyin: nǐ de zhízé shì rìcháng xíngzhèng gōngzuò jiān rénshì zhāopìn 。
examples.english: Your responsibilities are daily administrative work and personnel recruitment.

title: Expressing 'could it be possible that' with 'mofei'
explanation: Expressing 'could it be possible that' with 'mofei'

examples.chinese: 眼前这个人，莫非就是大名鼎鼎的房地产大亨？
examples.pinyin: yǎnqián zhègè rén，mòfēi jìushì dàmíngdǐngdǐng de fángdìchǎn dàhēng ？
examples.english: Is this person in front of him a real estate tycoon?

examples.chinese: 这么晚了他还没有回来，莫非他出了什么事？
examples.pinyin: zhèyāo wǎn le tā huán méiyǒu húilái，mòfēi tā chū le shíyāo shì ？
examples.english: He hasn't come back at this late hour. What could have happened to him?

examples.chinese: 桌子上那条鱼怎么不见了，莫非被猫偷吃了不成？
examples.pinyin: zhuōzǐ shàng nà tiáo yú zěnyāo bù jiàn le，mòfēi bèi māo tōu chī lebùchéng ？
examples.english: Why was the fish on the table gone, could it be stolen by the cat?

examples.chinese: 莫非他听到了我们的谈话？
examples.pinyin: mòfēi tā tīngdào le wǒmen de tánhuà ？
examples.english: Could it be that he heard our conversation?

examples.chinese: 莫非她真的是你的亲生母亲？
examples.pinyin: mòfēi tā zhēnde shì nǐ de qīnshēng mǔqīn ？
examples.english: Could she really be your biological mother?

title: Expressing 'from this' with 'youci'
structure: Reasons, 由此 + results and implications
explanation: Expressing 'from this' with 'youci'

examples.chinese: 人们滥用农药和其他化学原料，由此产生了一系列严重的食品安全问题。
examples.pinyin: rénmen làn yòng nóngyào hé qítā huàxué yuánliào，yóucǐ chǎnshēng le yīxìliè yánzhòng de shípǐn ānquán wèntí 。
examples.english: People abuse pesticides and other chemical raw materials, which has caused a series of serious food safety problems.

examples.chinese: 在案发现场我们发现了一些蚂蚁和蜂蜜，由此我们发现了罪犯的身份。
examples.pinyin: zài ànfā xiàncháng wǒmen fāxiàn le yīxiē mǎyǐ hé fēngmì，yóucǐ wǒmen fāxiàn le zùifàn de shēnfèn 。
examples.english: We found some ants and honey at the crime scene, from which we discovered the identity of the criminal.

examples.chinese: 最近很多贪官因为情妇举报而落马，由此看来，情妇反腐也是一个好方法。
examples.pinyin: zùijìn hěnduō tānguān yīnwèi qíngfù jǔbào ér luòmǎ，yóucǐ kànlái，qíngfù fǎnfǔ yě shì yī gè hǎo fāngfǎ 。
examples.english: Recently, many corrupt officials have been dismissed because of mistress reports. From this point of view, mistresses are also a good way to fight corruption.

examples.chinese: 由此可见，政府进行彻底地政治和经济改革是多么必要。
examples.pinyin: yóucǐ kějiàn，zhèngfǔ jìnxíng chèdǐ dì zhèngzhì hé jīngjì gǎigé shì duōyāo bìyào 。
examples.english: This shows how necessary it is for the government to carry out thorough political and economic reforms.

examples.chinese: 由此可见
examples.pinyin: yóucǐkějiàn
examples.english: This shows

title: Expressing “must' with 'feidei'
structure: Statement, 非 (得) + Action + 不可 / 不行
explanation: Expressing “must' with 'feidei'. Used for expressing a rhetorical question.

examples.chinese: 有话好好说，干嘛非得吵架？
examples.pinyin: yǒu huà hǎohǎo shuō，gānma fēidé chǎojià ？
examples.english: If you have something to say, why do you have to quarrel?

examples.chinese: 现在是紧急情况，非得马上动手术不可。
examples.pinyin: xiànzài shì jǐnjí qíngkuàng，fēidé mǎshàng dòng shǒuzhú bùkě 。
examples.english: It's an emergency now and you have to have an operation immediately.

examples.chinese: 我今天非骂他一顿不行！
examples.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān fēi mà tā yī dùn bùxíng！
examples.english: I must scold him for a meal today!

examples.chinese: 这件事你非得帮我查清楚不可！
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì nǐ fēidé bāng wǒ chá qīngchǔ bùkě！
examples.english: You have to help me find out this matter!

examples.chinese: 他这么做太过分了，我非得教训教训他不可！
examples.pinyin: tā zhèyāo zuò tài guòfēn le， wǒ fēidé jiàoxùn jiàoxùn tā bùkě！
examples.english: He did it too much, and I had to teach him a lesson!

title: Expressing 'nothing is more...than' with 'moguoyu'
structure: Topics or questions + 莫过于 + answer
explanation: Expressing 'nothing is more...than' with 'moguoyu'

examples.chinese: 美国最好的大学莫过于哈佛大学。
examples.pinyin: měiguó zùi hǎo de dàxué mòguòyú hāfódàxué 。
examples.english: The best university in the United States is Harvard.

examples.chinese: 人生中最悲伤的事情莫过于失去你爱的人。
examples.pinyin: rénshēng zhōng zùi bēishāng de shìqíng mòguòyú shīqù nǐ ài de rén 。
examples.english: The saddest thing in life is to lose the one you love.

examples.chinese: 让她最难过的莫过于你对她大喊大叫。
examples.pinyin: ràng tā zùi nánguò de mòguòyú nǐ dùi tā dàhǎn dàjiào 。
examples.english: The most sad thing for her is that you yell at her.

examples.chinese: 我能想到最浪漫的事莫过于跟你一起白头到老。
examples.pinyin: wǒ néng xiǎngdào zùi làngmàn de shì mòguòyú gēn nǐ yīqǐ báitóudàolǎo 。
examples.english: The most romantic thing I can think of is to grow old together with you.

examples.chinese: 对父母来说最大的安慰莫过于孩子能开始独立生活了。
examples.pinyin: dùi fùmǔ láishuō zùi dà de ānwèi mòguòyú háizǐ néng kāishǐ dúlì shēnghuó le 。
examples.english: The greatest comfort for parents is that the child can start an independent life.

title: Expressing 'Prefer...rather than' with 'yuqi...buru'
explanation: Expressing 'Prefer...rather than' with 'yuqi...buru'. Used for giving commands, expressing obligations.

examples.chinese: 天气这么好，与其在家看电视，不如出去走走。
examples.pinyin: tiānqì zhèyāo hǎo，yǔqí zài jiā kàn diànshì，bùrú chūqù zǒu zǒu 。
examples.english: The weather is so good, it is better to go for a walk than to watch TV at home.

examples.chinese: 与其干等，不如先去找点事做。
examples.pinyin: yǔqí gānděng ，bùrú xiān qù zhǎo diǎn shì zuò 。
examples.english: Instead of waiting, it's better to find something to do first.

examples.chinese: 与其自己乱想，不如当面问清楚。
examples.pinyin: yǔqí zìjǐ luàn xiǎng，bùrú dāngmiàn wèn qīngchǔ 。
examples.english: Rather than thinking about yourself, it is better to ask in person.

examples.chinese: 与其帮别人打工，还不如自己当老板。
examples.pinyin: yǔqí bāng biérén dǎgōng，huán bùrú zìjǐ dāng lǎobǎn 。
examples.english: Rather than helping others work, you might as well be your own boss.

examples.chinese: 与其麻烦别人，不如自己想办法。
examples.pinyin: yǔqí máfán biérén ，bùrú zìjǐ xiǎng bànfǎ 。
examples.english: Rather than trouble others, it is better to think for yourself.

title: Expressing 'similar to' with 'gen... shide'
explanation: Expressing 'similar to' with 'gen... shide'. Used for expressing preference.

examples.chinese: 她们俩好得跟亲姐妹似的。
examples.pinyin: tāmen liǎ hǎo dé gēn qīn jiěmèi sìde 。
examples.english: They are as good as their sisters.

examples.chinese: 最近天气热得跟在蒸笼里似的。
examples.pinyin: zùijìn tiānqì rè dé gēn zài zhēnglóng lǐ sìde 。
examples.english: The weather has been hot recently like in a steamer.

examples.chinese: 别跟他似的一天到晚好吃懒做。
examples.pinyin: bié gēn tā sìde yītiāndàowǎn hǎochī lǎnzuò 。
examples.english: Don't be as lazy as he is all day long.

examples.chinese: 他做这个最拿手了，跟很轻松似的就做好了。
examples.pinyin: tā zuò zhè gè zùi náshǒu le， gēn hěnqīngsōngsìde jìu zuò hǎo le 。
examples.english: He is the best at this, just like it is easy to do.

title: Expressing 'to be worthy of' with 'bukuishi'
structure: Subject + 不愧是（不愧为）+ reputation
explanation: Expressing 'to be worthy of' with 'bukuishi'. Used for expressing preference.

examples.chinese: 他不愧是一名光荣的人民教师。
examples.pinyin: tā bùkùishì yīmíng guāngróngde rénmín jiàoshī 。
examples.english: He deserves to be a glorious people's teacher.

examples.chinese: 危难关头，他挺身而出，不愧是一名优秀的人民解放军战士。
examples.pinyin: wēinán guāntóu，tā tǐngshēnérchū，bùkùishìyīmíng yōuxìude rénmínjiěfàngjūn zhànshì 。
examples.english: At the critical moment, he came forward and was worthy of being an outstanding PLA soldier.

examples.chinese: 她在这部电影里的表演真是太棒了，不愧是拿过奥斯卡金奖的。
examples.pinyin: tā zài zhè bù diànyǐng lǐ de biǎoyǎn zhēn shì tài bàng le，bùkùishì ná guò àosīqiǎ jīnjiǎng de 。
examples.english: Her performance in this movie is really awesome. She deservedly won the Oscar.

examples.chinese: 儿子，干得好！不愧是我们老王家的人！
examples.pinyin: érzǐ，gāndéhǎo！bùkùishì wǒmen lǎowáng jiā de rén！
examples.english: Good job, son! Worthy of being our old royal family!

title: Expressing who is in charge with 'you... zuozhu'
structure: Area of responsibility + 由 + Person(s) + 做主
explanation: Expressing who is in charge with 'you... zuozhu'. Used for expressing similarity.

examples.chinese: 我们家由我妈妈做主，她说什么我和爸爸就做什么。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen jiā yóu wǒ māmā zuòzhǔ，tā shuō shíyāo wǒ hé bàbà jìu zuò shíyāo 。
examples.english: Our family is dominated by my mother, and she and me will do what she says.

examples.chinese: 作为商店经理，所有的事情都由你做主，出了事情也由你负责。
examples.pinyin: zuòwèi shāngdiàn jīnglǐ，suǒyǒu de shìqíng dū yóu nǐ zuòzhǔ，chū le shìqíng yě yóu nǐ fùzé 。
examples.english: As a store manager, you are in charge of everything, and you are also responsible for things that happen.

examples.chinese: 极权主义政府通常是由一人或一党做主，而民主社会通常是由全民做主。
examples.pinyin: jíquán zhǔyì zhèngfǔ tōngcháng shì yóu yī rén huò yī dǎng zuòzhǔ，ér mínzhǔ shèhùi tōngcháng shì yóu quánmín zuòzhǔ 。
examples.english: The totalitarian government is usually dominated by one person or one party, while the democratic society is usually dominated by the whole people.

title: Stating two or more reasons with 'yilai...erlai'
explanation: Stating two or more reasons with 'yilai...erlai'. Used for expressing similarity.

examples.chinese: 你不要去那个地方旅游，一来是那边的宾馆很贵，二来那边也没有什么好看的风景。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bù yào qù nàgè dìfāng lv̌yóu，yīlái shìnàbiān de bīnguǎn hěn gùi，èrlái yěnàbiān méiyǒu shíyāo hǎokàn de fēngjǐng 。
examples.english: You don't want to travel to that place. First, the hotel there is expensive, and second, there is no beautiful scenery there.

examples.chinese: 这次来中国，一来是提高中文水平，二来是更深度的了解中国文化。
examples.pinyin: zhè cì lái zhōngguó，yīlái shì tígāo zhōngwén shǔipíng，èrlái shì gèng shēndù de lejiě zhōngguó wénhuà 。
examples.english: I came to China this time to improve the Chinese language level and secondly to gain a deeper understanding of Chinese culture.

examples.chinese: 三十年前，邓小平之所以推动改革开放，一来是为了提高人民的生活水平，二来是为了让中国经济从计划经济转变到市场经济。
examples.pinyin: sānshí nián qián，dèngxiǎo píngzhīsuǒyǐ tūidòng gǎigé kāifàng，yīlái shì wèile tígāo rénmín de shēnghuó shǔipíng，èrlái shì wèile ràng zhōngguó jīngjì cóng jìhuájīngjì zhuǎnbiàn dào shìchángjīngjì 。
examples.english: Thirty years ago, the reason why Deng Xiaoping promoted reform and opening up was to improve people's living standards and to transform the Chinese economy from a planned economy to a market economy.

title: Expressing 'I bet' using 'liang'
explanation: Expressing 'I bet' using 'liang'. Used for emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 谅他也不敢！
examples.pinyin: liàng tā yě bùgǎn！
examples.english: Forgive him!

examples.chinese: 我谅你也不敢跟那个女的讲话！
examples.pinyin: wǒ liàng nǐ yě bù gǎn gēn nàgè nv̌de jiǎnghuà！
examples.english: I forgive you for not talking to that woman!

examples.chinese: 我谅他也没胆量做出这样的事情来。
examples.pinyin: wǒ liàng tā yě méi dǎnliàng zuò chū zhèyáng de shìqíng lái 。
examples.english: I forgive him for not having the guts to do such a thing.

examples.chinese: 他是谅你不敢去投诉才这么说的，你可不能就这么算了！
examples.pinyin: tā shì liàng nǐ bù gǎn qù tóusù cái zhèyāo shuō de，nǐ kě bù néng jìu zhèyāo suànle！
examples.english: He said that he forgave you for daring to make a complaint, but you ca n’t just forget it!

title: Expressing something is 'not worth doing' with 'buxie'
explanation: Expressing something is 'not worth doing' with 'buxie'

examples.chinese: 我的同事是一个很诚实的人，他不屑说谎。
examples.pinyin: wǒ de tóngshì shì yīgè hěn chéngshí de rén ，tā bùxiè shuōhuǎng 。
examples.english: My colleague is a very honest person, he disdains lying.

examples.chinese: 人家都不屑跟你说话，你就不要热脸贴在冷屁股上了。
examples.pinyin: rénjiā dū bùxiè gēn nǐshuōhuà，nǐ jìu bù yào rèliǎntiēzàilěngpìgǔshàng le 。
examples.english: People don't bother to talk to you, so you shouldn't stick your hot face on the cold ass.

examples.chinese: 要是你想要向雷锋同志学习，你应该不屑于说别人的坏话。
examples.pinyin: yàoshì nǐ xiǎngyào xiàng léifēng tóngzhì xuéxí ，nǐ yìnggāi bùxièyú shuō biérén de huàihuà 。
examples.english: If you want to learn from Comrade Lei Feng, you should not bother to say bad things about others.

examples.chinese: 有些官员表面上不屑于收受贿赂，其实暗地里他们比谁收的都多。
examples.pinyin: yǒuxiē guānyuán biǎomiàn shàng bùxièyú shōushòu hùilù，qíshí àndìlǐ tāmen bǐ shúi shōu de dūduō 。
examples.english: Some officials seem to disdain to accept bribes, but in fact they secretly receive more than anyone.

title: Comparing 'budebu' and 'zhihao'
explanation: Comparing 'budebu' and 'zhihao'. Used for expressing certainty.

examples.chinese: 出门没有带钱，不得不向朋友借。
examples.pinyin: chūmén méiyǒu dài qián，bùdébù xiàng péngyǒu jiè 。
examples.english: I didn't bring money to go out, so I had to borrow it from my friends.

examples.chinese: 很喜欢那件衣服，可是没带够钱，只好不买了。
examples.pinyin: hěn xǐhuān nàjiàn yīfú，kěshì méi dài gòu qián，zhǐhǎo bù mǎi le 。
examples.english: I like that dress very much, but I didn't bring enough money, so I had to buy it.

examples.chinese: 刚下飞机，还没找到宾馆，行李不得不寄存在朋友那。
examples.pinyin: gāng xià fēijī，huán méi zhǎodào bīnguǎn，xínglǐ bùdébù jìcún zài péngyǒu nà 。
examples.english: Just after getting off the plane, I haven't found a hotel yet, so I have to store my luggage with my friend.

examples.chinese: 刚下飞机，还没找到宾馆，行李只好寄存在朋友那。
examples.pinyin: gāng xià fēijī，huán méi zhǎodào bīnguǎn，xínglǐ zhǐhǎo jìcún zài péngyǒu nà 。
examples.english: I just got off the plane and I didn't find a hotel yet, so I had to leave my luggage with my friend.

examples.chinese: 迫于生计，他不得不到大城市去打工。
examples.pinyin: pòyú shēngjì，tā bùdébù dào dàchéngshì qù dǎgōng 。
examples.english: Forced to make a living, he had to work in a big city.

title: Comparing 'fan'er' and “que'
explanation: Comparing 'fan'er' and “que'

examples.chinese: 你这么做，效果反而不好。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhèyāo zuò，xiàoguǒ fǎnér bù hǎo 。
examples.english: If you do this, the effect is not good.

examples.chinese: 你这么做，反而效果不好。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhèyāo zuò，fǎnérxiàoguǒ bù hǎo 。
examples.english: If you do this, it will not work well.

examples.chinese: 外面下雨，我却没带伞。
examples.pinyin: wàimiàn xiàyǔ，wǒ què méi dài sǎn 。
examples.english: It was raining outside, but I didn't bring an umbrella.

examples.chinese: ChicagoBulls没赢最后一场比赛，反而是Knicks。
examples.pinyin: Chicago Bulls méi yíng zùihòu yī cháng bǐsài，fǎnér shì Knicks 。
examples.english: Chicago Bulls did not win the last game, but Knicks.

examples.chinese: 他们都觉得Knicks会输掉最后一场比赛，结果他们反而赢了。
examples.pinyin: tāmen dū juédé Knicks hùi shū diào zùihòu yī cháng bǐsài，jiéguǒ tāmen fǎnér yíng le 。
examples.english: They all felt that Knicks would lose the last game, but instead they won.

title: Comparing 'genben' and 'daodi'
explanation: Comparing 'genben' and 'daodi'. Used for describing things, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 我根本不知道如何有效地管理。
examples.pinyin: wǒ gēnběn bù zhīdào rúhé yǒuxiào dì guǎnlǐ 。
examples.english: I simply don't know how to manage it effectively.

examples.chinese: 你为什么说昨天在街上看到我了？
examples.pinyin: nǐ wèishíyāo shuō zuótiān zài jiēshàng kàndào wǒ le ？
examples.english: Why did you say that you saw me on the street yesterday?

examples.chinese: 他只是一个小孩子，根本没见过这么吓人的事情。
examples.pinyin: tā zhǐ shì yī gè xiǎo háizǐ，gēnběn méi jiàn guò zhèyāo xiàrén de shìqíng 。
examples.english: He was just a child, and he had never seen such a scary thing.

examples.chinese: 今天新同事又迟到了，他到底想不想在这里做了？
examples.pinyin: jīntiān xīn tóngshì yòu chídào le，tā dàodǐ xiǎng bù xiǎng zài zhèlǐ zuò le ？
examples.english: Today the new colleague is late again, does he want to do it here?

examples.chinese: 你的包这么重！你到底带了多少东西？
examples.pinyin: nǐ de bāo zhèyāo zhòng！nǐ dàodǐ dàile duōshǎo dōngxī ？
examples.english: Your bag is so heavy! How much did you bring?

title: Comparing 'genju' and 'ju'
explanation: Comparing 'genju' and 'ju'

examples.chinese: 据实报道
examples.pinyin: jù shí bàodào
examples.english: According to actual reports

examples.chinese: 根据事实报道
examples.pinyin: gēnjù shìshí bàodào
examples.english: According to fact reports

examples.chinese: 据说他去上海了。
examples.pinyin: jùshuō tā qù shànghǎi le 。
examples.english: It is said that he went to Shanghai.

examples.chinese: 据传首相将要辞职。
examples.pinyin: jùchuán shǒuxiāng jiāngyào cízhí 。
examples.english: The Prime Minister is rumored to be resigning.

examples.chinese: 据他说，灾情并不是很严重。
examples.pinyin: jù tā shuō，zāiqíng bìng bùshì hěn yánzhòng 。
examples.english: According to him, the disaster was not very serious.

title: Comparing 'huifu' and 'huanyuan'
explanation: Comparing 'huifu' and 'huanyuan'

examples.chinese: 恢复体力。
examples.pinyin: hūifù tǐlì 。
examples.english: Physical recovery.

examples.chinese: 中国1977年恢复了高考。
examples.pinyin: zhōngguó 1977nián hūifù le gāokǎo 。
examples.english: China resumed the college entrance examination in 1977.

examples.chinese: 地铁恢复了正常运行。
examples.pinyin: dìtiě hūifù le zhèngcháng yùnxíng 。
examples.english: The subway has resumed normal operation.

examples.chinese: 他的身体恢复了。
examples.pinyin: tā de shēntǐ hūifù le 。
examples.english: His body recovered.

examples.chinese: 社会秩序恢复了。
examples.pinyin: shèhùi zhìxù hūifù le 。
examples.english: Social order has been restored.

title: Comparing 'juran' and 'fan'er'
structure: Clause 1, 反而 / 居然 + unexpected opposite outcome
explanation: Comparing 'juran' and 'fan'er'

examples.chinese: 我打他，他居然没哭。
examples.pinyin: wǒ dǎ tā，tā jūrán méi kū 。
examples.english: I beat him, he didn't cry.

examples.chinese: 我帮他，他反而生气了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bāng tā，tā fǎnér shēngqì le 。
examples.english: I helped him, but he was angry.

examples.chinese: 经过治疗，他的病情不仅没有好转，反而恶化了。
examples.pinyin: jīngguò zhìliáo，tā de bìngqíng bùjǐn méiyǒu hǎozhuǎn，fǎnér èhuà le 。
examples.english: After treatment, his condition not only did not improve, but worsened.

examples.chinese: 吃了这些减肥药，不但没有瘦，反而更胖了。
examples.pinyin: chīle zhèxiē jiǎnféiyào，bùdàn méiyǒu shòu，fǎnér gèng pàng le 。
examples.english: After taking these diet pills, not only did they not lose weight, but they became fatter.

examples.chinese: 雨不仅没停，反而越下越大了。
examples.pinyin: yǔ bùjǐn méi tíng，fǎnér yuè xià yuè dà le 。
examples.english: Not only did the rain stop, but it was getting bigger and bigger.
